metadata.title: Kinética — AI-powered fitness coach
metadata.description: Your intelligent personal trainer. Plans, tracking and virtual coach Kai.

auth.registerSubtitle: Create your account and start with Kai

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.emptyState: No data yet. Complete your onboarding with Kai.
dashboard.onboardingBody: Tell Kai your goal, availability and equipment, and he'll generate your personalized training plan.

progress.title: Your progress
progress.emptyBody: Log your first workout from the Plan tab and you'll see your evolution here.
progress.volumeSubtitle: Kg lifted in your latest sessions

plan.title: Weekly plan
plan.emptyState: You don't have an active plan. Ask Kai to generate one.
plan.noPlanDescription: Kai hasn't generated your weekly plan yet. Start chatting with him or generate one now.
plan.errorGenerating: Couldn't generate the plan. Please try again.

ruedo.saveError: Couldn't save the workout. Please try again.
ruedo.savedBody: Great job. Your progress has been logged.

coach.title: Coach Kai
coach.emptyState: You'll chat with Kai, your personal coach, here.
coach.inputHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line

settings.title: Settings
settings.theme_kinetic_desc: Athletic poster. Vibrant, motivating, full of energy.

disclaimer.title: Important medical notice
disclaimer.acceptCheckbox: I have read and accept the medical notice
disclaimer.scrollToRead: Scroll to read all the content
